children.text: submit an application, which shall contain, at a minimum, the information described in subsection (e), to the State educational agency at such time, in such manner, and containing such information as the State educational agency may reasonably require; and
complete a needs assessment in accordance with subsection (d).

children.heading: Consortium
children.label: b Consortium
children.text: If a local educational agency desires to carry out the activities described in this subpart in consortium with one or more surrounding local educational agencies as described in , such local educational agencies shall submit a single application as required under subsection (a).section 7115(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A local educational agency, or consortium of such agencies, shall develop its application through consultation with parents, teachers, principals, other school leaders, specialized instructional support personnel, students, community-based organizations, local government representatives (which may include a local law enforcement agency, local juvenile court, local child welfare agency, or local public housing agency), Indian tribes or tribal organizations that may be located in the region served by the local educational agency (where applicable), charter school teachers, principals, and other school leaders (if such agency or consortium of such agencies supports charter schools), and others with relevant and demonstrated expertise in programs and activities designed to meet the purpose of this subpart.

children.heading: Continued consultation
children.label: 2 Continued consultation
children.text: The local educational agency, or consortium of such agencies, shall engage in continued consultation with the entities described in paragraph (1) in order to improve the local activities in order to meet the purpose of this subpart and to coordinate such implementation with other related strategies, programs, and activities being conducted in the community.

children.label: A
children.text: access to, and opportunities for, a well-rounded education for all students;

children.label: B
children.text: school conditions for student learning in order to create a healthy and safe school environment; and

children.label: C
children.text: access to personalized learning experiences supported by technology and professional development for the effective use of data and technology.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: A local educational agency receiving an allocation under in an amount that is less than $30,000 shall not be required to conduct a comprehensive needs assessment under paragraph (1).section 7115(a) of this title

children.heading: Frequency of needs assessment
children.label: 3 Frequency of needs assessment
children.text: Each local educational agency, or consortium of local educational agencies, shall conduct the needs assessment described in paragraph (1) once every 3 years.

children.label: A
children.text: any partnership with an institution of higher education, business, nonprofit organization, community-based organization, or other public or private entity with a demonstrated record of success in implementing activities under this subpart;

children.label: B
children.text: if applicable, how funds will be used for activities related to supporting well-rounded education under ;section 7117 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: if applicable, how funds will be used for activities related to supporting safe and healthy students under ;section 7118 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: if applicable, how funds will be used for activities related to supporting the effective use of technology in schools under ; andsection 7119 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: the program objectives and intended outcomes for activities under this subpart, and how the local educational agency, or consortium of such agencies, will periodically evaluate the effectiveness of the activities carried out under this section based on such objectives and outcomes.

children.label: i
children.text: are among the schools with the greatest needs, as determined by such local educational agency, or consortium;

children.label: ii
children.text: have the highest percentages or numbers of children counted under ;section 6333(c) of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: are identified for comprehensive support and improvement under ;section 6311(c)(4)(D)(i) of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: are implementing targeted support and improvement plans as described in ; orsection 6311(d)(2) of this title

children.label: v
children.text: are identified as a persistently dangerous public elementary school or secondary school under ;section 7912 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: comply with (regarding equitable participation by private school children and teachers);section 7881 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: use not less than 20 percent of funds received under this subpart to support one or more of the activities authorized under ;section 7117 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: use not less than 20 percent of funds received under this subpart to support one or more activities authorized under ;section 7118 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: use a portion of funds received under this subpart to support one or more activities authorized under , including an assurance that the local educational agency, or consortium of local educational agencies, will comply with ; andsection 7119(a) of this titlesection 7119(b) of this title

children.label: F
children.text: annually report to the State for inclusion in the report described in how funds are being used under this subpart to meet the requirements of subparagraphs (C) through (E).section 7114(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: f Special rule
children.text: Any local educational agency receiving an allocation under in an amount less than $30,000 shall be required to provide only one of the assurances described in subparagraphs (C), (D), and (E) of subsection (e)(2).section 7115(a)(1) of this title
